title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
